input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.6
            TITLE: presentation equipment

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.6: Presentation Equipment
S.2.6 Presentation Equipment 
Teams planning to use data projectors, visual display devices (tablets, computers, etc.), or 
other communication means as part of their presentation must bring, or arrange for, their 
own equipment.

final_answer: rule S.2.6: Presentation Equipment Teams planning to use data projectors, visual display devices (tablets, computers, etc.), or other communication means as part of their presentation must bring, or arrange for, their own equipment.
